entry.value: Exception occurred while performing 'Create' operation on identity 'null': Url: https://online.actitime.com/eshiam10/api/v1/users, Message: 200 : { "id" : 29, "username" : "Aaron Allen", "active" : true, "firstName" : "Aaron", "middleName" : "", "lastName" : "Allen", "departmentId" : -1, "timeZoneGroupId" : -1, "hired" : "2025-04-16", "releaseDate" : null, "email" : "aaron.allen@eshiam.com", "allowedActions" : { "canSubmitTimetrack" : true }, "fullName" : "Aaron Allen" }, HTTP Error Code: 200
